one_line_ask: Build a premium, bold luxury-car prize hero image for a UK raffle brand from a licensed stock supercar — isolate it, AI-expand the canvas into a wider hero scene, apply a bold premium color grade with cinematic depth, and export Instagram and Facebook ad-ready crops plus a clean vector of the brand logo.
brief:
We are a fast-growing UK online raffle & competition company ("Velvet Wins") and our next campaign gives away a luxury supercar. We need a single premium, bold, attention-grabbing HERO image of the prize car — the kind of look luxury raffle / casino / giveaway brands use — that we can reuse across Instagram posts/ads, Facebook ad creatives, and a website competition banner.

Starting point: we don't have our own studio shot of the car, so source a high-quality licensed stock photo of a luxury sports car (dark, glossy, dramatic studio or showroom lighting, three-quarter front angle, clean background). License it properly before any editing.

What we need done to it:
1. Straighten and clean-crop the licensed plate so the car sits level and well-composed.
2. Isolate the car from its original background so we control the scene.
3. AI-expand the canvas wider and taller into a cinematic hero composition with breathing room around the car (room for our headline and CTA to be added later in our own template) — this is an outpaint/extend, not a composite.
4. Grade it to a bold, premium luxury look: punchy contrast, rich deep blacks, controlled highlights on the bodywork, a slightly cool/tea
